reason: Backend stack overview and pre-development guide entry point for Python async/runtime work.
Interruption must convert engine/tool failures into provider-safe stream events or tool results.
Implementation touches async code and requires pytest/ruff/mypy-aligned tests.
Cancellation and queue behavior should use project logging conventions.
Reference design for typed interrupts, queue draining, tool interrupt policy, and synthetic tool results.
Current OpenHarness behavior, gaps, likely impacted areas, and test points.
